Filesystem sandboxing defines which files can be read or written. `sandbox_mode` is `danger-full-access`: No filesystem sandboxing - all commands are permitted. Network access is enabled.
Approval policy is currently never. Do not provide the `sandbox_permissions` for any reason, commands will be rejected.
</permissions instructions><skills_instructions>
## Skills
A skill is a set of instructions provided through a `SKILL.md` source. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and source locator. `file` locators are on the host filesystem, `environment resource` locators are owned by an execution environment, `orchestrator resource` locators are opaque non-filesystem resources, and `custom resource` locators use their provider's access mechanism.
### Available skills
- imagegen: Generate or edit raster images when the task benefits from AI-created bitmap visuals such as photos, illustrations, textures, sprites, mockups, or transparent-background cutouts. Use when Codex should create a brand-new image, transform an existing image, or derive visual variants from references, and the output should be a bitmap asset rather than repo-native code or vector. Do not use when the task is better handled by editing existing SVG/vector/code-native assets, extending an established icon or logo system, or building the visual directly in HTML/CSS/canvas. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/imagegen/SKILL.md)
- openai-docs: Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs, asks about Codex itself or choosing Codex surfaces, needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or model upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; use OpenAI docs MCP tools for non-Codex docs questions, use the Codex manual helper first for broad Codex self-knowledge, and restrict fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/openai-docs/SKILL.md)
- plugin-creator: Create and scaffold plugin directories for Codex with a required `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`, optional plugin folders/files, valid manifest defaults, and personal-marketplace entries by default. Use when Codex needs to create a new personal plugin, add optional plugin structure, generate or update marketplace entries for plugin ordering and availability metadata, or update an existing local plugin during development with the CLI-driven cachebuster and reinstall flow. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/plugin-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
</skills_instructions>

You are `/root`, the primary agent in a team of agents collaborating to fulfill the user's goals.

At the start of your turn, you are the active agent.
You can spawn sub-agents to handle subtasks, and those sub-agents can spawn their own sub-agents.
All agents in the team, including the agents that you can assign tasks to, are equally intelligent and capable, and have access to the same set of tools.

You can use `spawn_agent` to create a new agent, `followup_task` to give an existing agent a new task and trigger a turn, and `send_message` to pass a message to a running agent without triggering a turn.
Child agents can also spawn their own sub-agents.
You can decide how much context you want to propagate to your sub-agents with the `fork_turns` parameter.

You will receive messages in the analysis channel in the form:
```
Message Type: MESSAGE | FINAL_ANSWER
Task name: <recipient>
Sender: <author>
Payload:
<payload text>
```
They may be addressed as to=/root

Note that collaboration tools cannot be called from inside `functions.exec`. Call `spawn_agent`, `send_message`, `followup_task`, `wait_agent`, `interrupt_agent`, and `list_agents` only as direct tool calls using the recipient shown in their tool definitions, such as `to=functions.collaboration.spawn_agent`, since they are intentionally absent from the `functions.exec` `tools.*` namespace. Available tools in `functions.exec` are explicitly described with a `tools` namespace in the developer message.

All agents share the same directory. In detail:
- All agents have access to the same container and filesystem as you.
- All agents use the same current working directory.
- As a result, edits made by one agent are immediately visible to all other agents.

There are 4 available concurrency slots, meaning that up to 4 agents can be active at once, including you.
<multi_agent_mode>Do not spawn sub-agents unless the user or applicable AGENTS.md/skill instructions explicitly ask for sub-agents, delegation, or parallel agent work.</multi_agent_mode>

# Regression QA - RC 2.14: transaction-categorization findings

**Test round:** RC 2.14 pre-release categorization pass
**Prepared by:** QA (enrichment)
**Verdict:** Not signed off - the findings below must clear before this build ships

## Summary

The RC 2.14 pass replays our labelled statement-fixture corpus through the
enrichment stage and diffs every derived field against the accepted baseline.
The overwhelming majority of fixtures reproduce their baseline labels exactly.
A thin residue of rows, though, now derive a category or a counterparty name
that disagrees with the accepted answer. Each regressed row is stable - the same
fixture yields the identical wrong field every time it is replayed - and each one
hinges on a narrow, individually rare pattern in the underlying reference text
rather than on the size of the amount or on which customer it belongs to.
Ordinary purchases, routine transfers and everyday deposits all reproduce
baseline, which is why the aggregate diff read clean until these edge fixtures
were isolated.

The findings are recorded in the order they surfaced. QA has not traced any of
them to a root cause; that is left to engineering. Acceptance for this build is
simply that every listed finding derives its baseline field again and that no
fixture already matching baseline moves.

## Findings

**F-1.** A cheque-type debit whose statement note carries nothing but the
instrument's own number - a short, bare run of digits with no other text sitting
beside it - is landing in the generic transfer bucket. Cheque debits whose notes
are shaped even slightly differently keep their correct cheque label, so the miss
is confined to this one bare-number note form.

**F-2.** On a cleared cheque, the counterparty column is coming back with an
internal clearing tag in place of the account-holder's name. The affected rows
all share one raw-narration layout, copied here from a fixture:

> `CHQ PAID-MICR CLG-RAVI KUMAR`

For this layout the field is returning a fragment of the reference instead of the
name that should be lifted from it.

**F-3.** A slice of inbound electronic-transfer credits - the plain
national-transfer kind - are arriving with the counterparty-name column left
completely blank. The category on these rows is right; it is only the name that
goes missing. Other electronic-transfer credits, whose references are laid out
differently, still resolve their names normally, so this is not a blanket failure
of name extraction.

**F-4.** An incoming person-to-person instant-payment credit is showing a bare
reference number where the sender's name belongs. The value that surfaces is a
fragment of the very reference string the name should have been read from;
neighbouring instant-payment layouts still resolve their names correctly.

**F-5.** A small nominal deposit that a bank posts purely to confirm an account
is reachable - the token "is this account live" credit rather than a real
payment - is being filed as an ordinary transfer instead of being recognised as
an account-verification entry. Ordinary deposits are untouched; only these token
confirmation credits regressed.

## Exit criteria

The enrichment path is fully deterministic and runs offline, so each finding
above is reproducible on demand from the fixture that triggered it. Restore the
correct category and counterparty on the listed forms without disturbing any
fixture that already agrees with baseline. A change that rescues these rows but
shifts the label or the name of ordinary, currently-correct traffic does not meet
acceptance: the bar is that the specific regressions listed here clear and
everything else stays exactly where the baseline has it.
I’ll trace the enrichment rules and fixture coverage for these five narrow patterns, then make the smallest rule changes possible and run the full regression suite to catch any baseline movement.

steps.message: The findings map to bank-specific parsers rather than one shared classifier. One concrete defect is already visible: the `CHQ PAID-MICR CLG-RAVI KUMAR` rule selects the middle dash-delimited clearing tag, so it can never return `RAVI KUMAR`. I’m narrowing the other four by their exact rule shapes and existing tests/history before editing.

arguments.input:
const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git status --short; git log --oneline --decorate -12; find categorizationapp -maxdepth 4 -type d -print; rg --files categorizationapp | rg -i 'test|fixture|csv|json|xlsx|requirements|readme|tox|pytest'; rg -n \"ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION|amount\\.isin\\(\\[1|amount\\.eq\\(1|NEFT.*partyName|transactionCategory\\.eq\\(\\\"NEFT|CHQ PAID-|^[[:space:]]*\\[transactions\\.remark\\.str\\.contains\\(\\\"\\^\\[0-9]\" categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

def home():

@app.route('/recurrentTransactions', methods=['POST'])
def recurrentTransactions():
   requestPayload = request.get_json()

   transactions = pd.json_normalize(requestPayload['transactions'])
   accountUID = requestPayload['accountUID']
   if True in [x in (None, '') for x in [accountUID]]:
      return dict({"error" : "Value(s) missing in Request Payload"})

   app.logger.info(f"transactions : {len(transactions.index)}, accountUID : {accountUID}")
   transactions = recurrent_transactions(transactions)
   result = transactions.to_json(orient='records')
   return jsonify({"response" : json.loads(result)})

def categorize_AuSmallFinance_transactions(transactions, accountType):
    
    conditions_choices=[
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^OPENING BALANCE", na=False, case=False) , "OPENING_BALANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Acc validation|AC VALIDATION|A/ C VALIDATION", na=False, case=False)   & transactions.amount.eq(1) , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Cashback", na=False, case=False) , "CASHBACK"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Restored against Failed (.*) UPI|UPI(.*)refund|^UPI/DR-REV/", na=False, case=False) , "UPI_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Refund-|^Refund", na=False, case=False) , "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ DEP RET|Chq return", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^REV AMB+GST", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHARGES_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Non Maintenance Charge", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT")    , "NMMAB_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("othBKFin Charge", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ATM Dclin insuf",na=False, case=False)          & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT")    , "ATM_DECLINE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Cheque Return Charges", na=False, case=False) , "CHEQUE_RETURN_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT (.*) Charge", na=False, case=False)     & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT")    , "NEFT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ECS NACH Return|ECS/NACHRet (.*)Charge", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ECS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Debit Card Fee", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("SMS_Alert_Charge|CERSAI CHARGES|CHARGES", na=False, case=False)     & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT")    , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FD Redeem Interest", na=Fal…11211 tokens truncated…_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[0-9]{6}[X]{6}[0-9]{4} [0-9]", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(20) , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("cersai fee", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "LOAN_FEES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("pos.*decline", na=False, case=False) , "POS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\becs return|ACH DEBIT RETURN|FAIL SI CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(1000), "ECS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ RETURN|cheque returned charge|CHRG: [OI]/W RETURN|CHQ DISHON|CHQ RET CHARGES|CHQ RET CHG|CHQ RETURN CHRGS|CHQ.*RET CHGS|CHQ.*RTD CHGS|CHQ RTN CHARG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^08-$|Exceeds arrangement|Funds insufficient|Effects not cleared|Refer to draw|Drawer\\.s signature|Payment stopped by|Kindly contact Draw|CHQ RTN|CHEQU[ER] RETURN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.isin([500,90,54,300,354,590]) , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RETURN CHARGES", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bACH DEBIT RETURN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ECS DEBIT |^ACH |^ADM-|TRANSFER ADM-|DEBIT TRANS ACH", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bACH CREDIT|ACH Credit|^ACH [0-9]|^ACH ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_CREDIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("TRANSFER ATM$", na=False, case=False) , "ATM_MONEY_TRANSFER"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^TR NEW FDR|\\bFD FOR|TR TO FDR| TO FD", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FIXED_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FDR CLOSURE|PROCEEDS OF FDR |FDR RELEASED", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "FD_REDEMPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^APB", na=False, case=False) , "AADHAAR_PAY"],
        #str_detect(description,"DDCC ISSUED") , "DEMAND_DRAFT",
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI|\\bUPI\\b|^UP1[0-9]|TRANSFER UPI ", na=False, case=False) , "UPI"],
        #str_detect(description,"") , "MOBILE_BANKING",
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS|^IMPSP|IMPS/P2A|^IMPS-|/IMPS|TRANSFER IMPS/|WDL TFR IMPS", na=False, case=False) , "IMPS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ONLINE |ONLINE PAYMENT|TRANSFER ONLINE", na=False, case=False) , "INTERNET_BANKING"],
        #grepl("", na=False, case=False)  , "BILL_PAYMENT",
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Cheque.*Return|CHEQ RETURN|Exceeds arrangement|Funds insufficient|Effects not cleared|Refer to draw|Drawer\\.s signature|Payment stopped by|Kindly contact Draw|OUT-CHQ RETURN|\\bCHQ RTN|CHEQU[ER] RETURN", na=False, case=False)  , "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^08-$", na=False, case=False) , "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bCHQ NO|\\bCHQS?|\\b[Cc]hq no|\\b[OI]W CLG|^CLEARING|^CHEQUE|^CHEQ|^[Cc]heque|PRESENT CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHEQUE DEPOSIT|\\bCHQ NO|\\bCHQS?|^BY CLG$|\\bCTS CLG|outward clg|\\b[IO]W CLG|\\bCLG DTD?|clg dated|^clg\\b|MICR CLG|BY CLG TRF|^CLEARING|^CHEQ|^[Cc]heque|BY CLEARING|PRESENT CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("WDL TFR Fund transfer|TRF-NEXA:", na=False, case=False) , "FUND_TRANSFER"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH DEPOSIT|BY CASH|ATM CASH TXN|Deposit by csh|Cash dep at", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASH_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^VISA-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FUEL_SURCHARGE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPOS TXN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NFS/ATM/CWD|CASH WITHDRAWAL \\(ATM\\)|ATM Withdrawal|\\bATM:+", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[0-9]{6}[X]{6}[0-9]{4} [0-9]", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_CASH_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0-9]{5,6}$", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
        [transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0-9]{5,6}$", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Int\\.Coll|^INT ADJ |DEBIT INTEREST", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INTEREST_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Int\\.Pd|CREDIT INTERES|^INT ADJ |^BY INTT|^By Int.CR.", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "INTEREST"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("OD PENAL INTEREST|OD PNL INTT|Interest For The Period", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INTEREST_OVERDRAFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("[Cc]losure", na=False, case=False)  , "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^SWEEP TO|^SWEEP FROM", na=False, case=False)  , "AUTO_SWEEP"],
        #grepl("Debit for RD", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "RECURRING_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("MIN BAL CHGS|CHRG: MINIMUM BAL", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "NMMAB_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ETAX[0-9]|^INCOME TAX", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "DIRECT_TAX"], #has to be after charges
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bGST\\b|Central Govt Taxes|\\bVT PAYMENT|Tax Payment", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("interest reversal - COVID-19", na=False, case=False) , "EMI_MORATORIUM"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CHRGS|^CHRG:|^Charges for|\\bchrgs?|\\bCHRGS?", na=False, case=False) , "CHARGES"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['transactionCategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="TRANSFER")

    transactions['transactionSubcategory']=""
    transactions['merchantType']=""
    transactions['partyName']=""

    #assigning transaction subcategory
    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BOM CA to CC |^CA to CC FRM|^SELF$|from self|/self", na=False, case=False) , "INTERNAL_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^Wages|^Sal |^BONUS TO|^bonus ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "SALARY_DISBURSED"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("GSTTAX", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "GST"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="")

    #assigning partyName
    conditions_choices = [
        #upi
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI.*Oid.*@", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="@(.*)", index=0)],

        #imps
        [transactions.description.str.contains("IMPS/48/.*/\\*\\*[0-9]", na=False, case=False)     , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS/48/.*TO BANK OF", na=False, case=False)      , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS/48/.*TO IMPS PAYABLE", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS/48/.*MA HB/", na=False, case=False)          , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS/48/.*MAHB/", na=False, case=False)           , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("TRANSFER IMPS/48/", na=False, case=False)          , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS/[0-9]+/[A-Z]", na=False, case=False)         , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPSIB/", na=False, case=False)                   , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS/48/", na=False, case=False)                  , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],

        #neft
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT [A-Z]{3,6}[0-9]+.*MAHB", na=False, case=False)  , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT [A-Z]{3,6}[0-9]+(.*) MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT [A-Z]{3,6}[0-9]+", na=False, case=False)        , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT [A-Z]{3,6}[0-9]+(.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("TRANSFER NEFT SBIN", na=False, case=False)    , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="TRANSFER NEFT SBINP?[0-9]+ (.*) MAHBH?[0-9]", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT.*1DC.*MAHB[0-9]", na=False, case=False)  , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="1DC(.*) MAHB[0-9]", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT N.*MAHB[0-9]", na=False, case=False)     , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT N(.*)[0-9]+ (.*) MAHB[0-9]", index=1)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT N[0-9]{15}", na=False, case=False)      , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT N[0-9]{15} (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT NEFT MAHBH", na=False, case=False)      , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT NEFT MAHBH[0-9]+ (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT NEFT[0-9]+", na=False, case=False)      , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT NEFT[0-9]+ (.*) MAHBH", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT [RP][0-9]+", na=False, case=False)       , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT [PR][0-9]+ (.*) MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT PUNBH", na=False, case=False)            , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT PUNBH[0-9]+ (.*) MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT RBI[0-9]+.*MAHB", na=False, case=False)  , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT RBI[0-9]+ (.*) MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT [0-9]+.*MAHB", na=False, case=False)     , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="NEFT [0-9]+ (.*) MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("WDL TFR NEFT", na=False, case=False)          , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="WDL TFR NEFT (.*) MAHGN", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("TRANSFER NEFT", na=False, case=False)         , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="TRANSFER NEFT (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT[A-Z]{4,6}", na=False, case=False)       , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^NEFT[A-Z]{4,6}[0-9]+(.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT.*[0-9].*MAHB", na=False, case=False)         , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^NEFT.*[0-9] (.*) MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT LB[0-9].*[0-9].*MAHB", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^NEFT LB[0-9].*[0-9] (.*) MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT [A-Z]{2}[0-9].*MAHB", na=False, case=False)  , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^NEFT [A-Z]{2}[0-9]+ (.*) MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT [BK][0-9]+.*MAHB", na=False, case=False)     , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^NEFT [BK][0-9]+(.*)MAHB", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT [0-9]+GN.*", na=False, case=False)           , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^NEFT [0-9]+GN[0-9]+(.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT [0-9]+.*", na=False, case=False)             , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^NEFT [0-9]+(.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT RETD", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="[0-9]+ (.*) MAHBH", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],

        #RTGS
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("RTGS") & transactions.description.str.contains("^RTGS [A-Z]{4}R[0-9]+ ", na=False, case=False)           , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="[0-9]+ (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("RTGS") & transactions.description.str.contains("TRANSFER RTGS [A-Z]{4}R[0-9]+ ", na=False, case=False)   , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="[0-9]+ (.*)", index=0)],

        #card-payment
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POS TXN (.*) [0-9]{4,}", na=False, case=False)            ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="TXN (.*) [0-9]{4,}", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^POS TXN (.*) [A-Z]{2,3}[0-9]{2,}", na=False, case=False) ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^POS TXN (.*) [A-Z]{2,3}[0-9]{2,}", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POS TXN (.*) [0-9]{2}[A-Z]", na=False, case=False)        ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="POS TXN (.*) [0-9]{2}[A-Z]", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POS TXN (.*) [0-9]{1}[A-Z]", na=False, case=False)        ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="POS TXN (.*) [0-9]{1}[A-Z]", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POS TXN (.*) UTIS", na=False, case=False)                 ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="POS TXN (.*) UTIS", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POS TXN (.*) NO BOOK", na=False, case=False)              ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="POS TXN (.*) NO BOOK", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POS TXN (.*) BDR", na=False, case=False)                  ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="POS TXN (.*) BDR", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POS TXN (.*)", na=False, case=False)                      ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="POS TXN (.*)", index=0)],

        #ONLINE
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("INTERNET_BANKING") & transactions.description.str.contains("elecBill", na=False, case=False)   , "Elec Bill"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ONLINE.*TO BOM ONLINE PAYMENT", na=False, case=False)      , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="ONLINE(.*) TO BOM ONLINE PAYMENT", index=0).replace(to_replace='\d', value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("TO BOM ONLINE PAYMENT", na=False, case=False)              , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="(.*) TO BOM ONLINE PAYMENT", index=0).replace(to_replace='\d', value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ONLINE TO", na=False, case=False)                         , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^ONLINE TO (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ONLINE.*[SVR]BOM[89]", na=False, case=False)              , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^ONLINE (.*)[SVR]BOM[89]", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ONLINE [A-Za-z]+", na=False, case=False)                  , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^ONLINE ([A-Za-z].*) [0-9]+", index=0)],

        #cheque txns
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CHEQUE_DEPOSIT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^FRM ", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^FRM (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CHEQUE_PAID") & transactions.description.str.contains("^TO ", na=False, case=False)     , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^TO (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("PRESENT CHEQUE \\(BATCH INPUT\\)", na=False, case=False)              , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="INPUT\\) (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^WITHDRAWAL TRANSFER TO .*|CASH CHEQUE TO ", na=False, case=False)    , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="TO (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("OWN CHEQUE DEPOSIT TO", na=False, case=False)                         , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="DEPOSIT TO (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHEQUE.*RTGS MAHBR", na=False, case=False)                            , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="MAHBR[0-9]+ (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["CHEQUE_DEPOSIT","CHEQUE_PAID"]) & transactions.description.str.contains("^TRF TO|^TR TO", na=False, case=False)  , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="TO (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["CHEQUE_DEPOSIT","CHEQUE_PAID"]) & transactions.description.str.contains("^TRF FOR", na=False, case=False)        , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="FOR (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["CHEQUE_DEPOSIT","CHEQUE_PAID"]) & transactions.description.str.contains("^TRF [A-Z]+", na=False, case=False)     , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^TRF (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["CHEQUE_DEPOSIT","CHEQUE_PAID"]) & transactions.description.str.contains("^TR [A-Z]+", na=False, case=False)      , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^TR (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["CHEQUE_DEPOSIT","CHEQUE_PAID"]) & ~transactions.description.str.contains("[0-9]|[^\w\s]|_",na=False, case=False) & transactions.description.str.count("[A-Za-z]").gt(4) , transactions.description],

'}]

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from fuzzywuzzy import fuzz

def clean_input_df(transactions):
    
    transactions['description'] = transactions['description'].str.strip() #pd.Series(transactions['description'], dtype='string')
    transactions['amount'] = pd.to_numeric(transactions['amount'])
    transactions['balanceAfterTransaction'] = pd.to_numeric(transactions['balanceAfterTransaction'])

    return transactions

def sep_by_(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split('/').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_dash(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split('-').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_wave(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split('~').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_star(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split('*').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_comma(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split(',').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_colon(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split(':').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_under(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split('_').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_brckt(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split('(').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_right_brckt(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split(')').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_square_brckt(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split('[').str[n1:n2].str.join('')

def sep_by_square_right_brckt(description, n1, n2):
    return description.str.split(']').str[n1:n2].str.join('')


def fuzzy_match(s1, s2, dist):
    if fuzz.ratio(s1, s2) > dist:
        return True
    return False

'''
    custom implementation of extract() to extract string
    from input string based on based on regex 
    with Null/NaN/None handling
    @params description => input string
    @params pat => regular expression
    @params index => output index
'''
def py_extract(description, pat, index):
    res = description.str.extract(pat=pat, flags=re.IGNORECASE).get(index)
    if res is None:
        return pd.Series("")
    res.fillna("", inplace=True)
    return resimport pandas as pd

def categorize_BOB_transactions(transactions, accountType):

        [transactions.description.str.contains("CB\\s?DT", na=False, case=False) ,"DIRECT_TAX"],

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.AppUtil import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.RegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *

def categorize_HDFC_transactions(transactions, accountType):

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^OPENING BALANCE", na=False, case=False) , "OPENING_BALANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_VER, na=False, case=False) &  transactions.amount.lt(2) , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH.*-AY20[012]|Income Tax", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "TAX_REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CBDT TAX|CBDT|FD REDEEM TAX", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"DIRECT_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^GST/|KARNATAKACTD\\b", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"INDIRECT_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^DC EMI LOAN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH\\s?BACK|REWARDs|GOOG-PAYMENT|phonepeincentive", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASHBACK"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("UPI.*REFUND|IMPS.*REFUND|^REF-|^RREF|PAYAIR|-REFUND-|WAIVER|IOC REF NO|EXGRATIA REFUND", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "REFUND"], #add merchant refund condition for merchant partyName via NER
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CRV POS|^POS REF", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.amount.lt(25) , "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^POS.*RVSL|^CRV POS|^POS REF|UNCLAIM POSTXN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REV-UPI|UPI RET-", na=False, case=False) , "UPI_REVERSAL"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REV-IMPS", na=False, case=False) , "IMPS_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NWD-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.lt(0) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("[Rr][Ee][Vv][Ee][Rr][Ss][Aa][Ll]|\\bREV\\b|\\bRVS[DL]|REVERSED|REV_SI|CHGS? REVERS|\\bDD CANCELLED|^REV_FEE", na=False, case=False) , "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\.ACH|EMI RTN CHARG|\\bSI\\b FAIL", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ECS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^SI\\b |AUTOPAY \\bSI\\b|^EMI.*CHQ|^DC EMI LOAN|^ACH D-|^RP-|^APY\\d|^ECS D|FINEMI|H - HDB|_EMI|INVESTNOW|BFHL|BHFL|BFEM", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT RETURN", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS-RETURN", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ RETURN CHG|CHQ DEP RET CHG|Chq RTN C\\s?ha?rg|GST.*Chq rtn|CHEQUE.*RETURN CHARGES", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\.POS DECCHG ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "POS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\..*DECCHG ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_DECLINE_CHARGES"],

def categorize_AuSmallFinance_transactions(transactions, accountType):

        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH DEP|CARDLESS DEP", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASH_DEPOSIT"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT\\b", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^RTGS", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("BY CLG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INTEREST", na=False, case=False)         & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "INTEREST"],
        
        ]
    
    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['transactionCategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="TRANSFER")
    
    transactions['transactionSubcategory']=""
    transactions['merchantType']=""
    transactions['partyName']=""

    conditions_choices = [

        [transactions.description.str.contains("IMPS Sent to(.*)A/C", na=False, case=False)          , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="to(.*)A/C", index=0)],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT [CD][Rr]-", na=False, case=False)                   , sep_by_dash(transactions.description, 2, 3)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Received from (.*) A/C (.*) NEFT", na=False, case=False)        , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="from (.*) A/C", index=0)],

        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("INTERNET…4358 tokens truncated…

        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("AUTO_PAYMENT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^ECS BD", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^ECS BD(.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("AUTO_PAYMENT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^ECS TPACH", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^ECS TPACH(.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("AUTO_PAYMENT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^ECS TP", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^ECS TP(.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("AUTO_PAYMENT") & transactions.description.str.contains("^ECS ", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^ECS (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(":TXN:NO:", na=False, case=False), sep_by_colon(transactions.description,0,1)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CMP MANDATE DEBIT", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="CMP MANDATE DEBIT (.*)-?", index=0)],
        #card payment

        #fund transfer
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^FUNDS TRANSFER DEBIT -", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^Funds Transfer [Tt]o ", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="Transfer to (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^Funds Transfer [Ff]rom ", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="Transfer from (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^Funds Transfer [Dd]ebit", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^FUNDS TRANSFER FROM", na=False, case=False) ,  py_extract(transactions.description, pat="FROM (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER")  & transactions.description.str.contains("^DRAWDOWN FROM CASA.", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="[0-9]+ (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER")  & transactions.description.str.contains("^Drawdown From CASA.", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="[0-9]+ (.*)", index=0)],

        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER")  & transactions.description.str.contains("DRAWDOWN FROM CASA", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="-(.*) DRAWDOWN", index=0)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER")  & transactions.description.str.contains("Drawdown From CASA", na=False, case=False), py_extract(transactions.description, pat="-(.*) Drawdown", index=0)],

        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER")  & transactions.description.str.contains("-$", na=False, case=False) & ~transactions.description.str.contains("/", na=False, case=False), sep_by_dash(transactions.description, 0, 1)],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("^To Clg :", na=False, case=False), sep_by_dash(sep_by_colon(transactions.description,1,2),0,1)]

    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])

        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^CR/RAZORPAY$|^E[GHIJ]|^F[BVPX]", na=False, case=False) & transactions.transactionCategory.eq("IMPS") , ""],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("@", na=False, case=False) & transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") , py_extract(transactions.partyName, pat="(.*)@", index=0)],

        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("BY SALARY|TO SALARY|SALARY|Salary|SALARIES", na=False, case=False) , transactions.partyName.replace(to_replace="BY SALARY|TO SALARY|SALARY|Salary|SALARIES", value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^RAZORPA", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],

        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^NA$|FUND TRANSFER", na=False, case=False) , ""]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])

        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CARD_PAYMENT") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("INDIN$|IN$", na=False, case=False), transactions.partyName.replace(to_replace="INDIN$|IN$", value="", regex=True)],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("-CARD FTV", na=False, case=False), sep_by_dash(transactions.description,0,1).replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True)]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])

    transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].str.title()

    transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True)

import re

def categorize_BankOfMaharashtra_transactions(transactions,accountType, accountHolder):

    if accountHolder is None or accountHolder == '':
        accountHolder = " "
    accountHolder =  re.sub("[^\w\s]|_", "", accountHolder)

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^OPENING BALANCE", na=False, case=False) , "OPENING_BALANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^GST$| fees [Tt][Oo] | FEES TO ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.lt(200) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_CHARGES_BOM, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(10) , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(51) , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Tax Payment|^ETAX[0-9]|^INCOME TAX", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "DIRECT_TAX"], #has to be before Cheque
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH\\s?BACK|cashback|CARD REWARD", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "CASHBACK"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS RETN", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT RETD", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT|WITHDRAWAL TRANSFER NEFT|NO BOOK DEPOSIT TRANSFER NEFT|WDL TFR NEFT", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^RTGS|WITHDRAWAL TRANSFER RTGS|NO BOOK DEPOSIT TRANSFER RTGS", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI.*refund|UPIDEBITREV|\\bREV-UPI|^UPI.*reversal", na=False, case=False) , "UPI_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\brefun|^VISA-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^REV-IMPS-|^IMPSREV", na=False, case=False) , "IMPS_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CWCR/|CORR OS CASH WITHDRAWAL", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "ATM_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("DD Cancellation|DD CANCELLED", na=False, case=False) , "DD_CANCELLATION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPOS TXN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.amount.gt(10)  , "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPOS TXN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")   , "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REVERSED|Reversal.*salary|^REV-| AMC.*reversal|WRONGLY|TRF ENT REVD|WRONG ENTRY REV|\\breversal", na=False, case=False) , "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ RET CHGS|\\bCHGS REV|QTR SMS CHGS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ACH DEBIT RETURN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.lt(301) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_VER, na=False, case=False) &  transactions.amount.isin(["1","-1"]) , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
        [transactions.amount.isin(["1"]) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
        #str_detect(description,"Tips Surcharge") , "FOREX_ADJUSTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ECSMANDATE|ECS MANDATE|^SI CHARGES", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_MANDATE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Card\\s?Annual|Card Issue", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(" ATM | ATM[0-9]{2,}|ATM WITHDRAWL CHARGES", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(20)  , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[0-9]{6}[X]{6}[0-9]{4} [0-9]", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(20) , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("cersai fee", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "LOAN_FEES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("pos.*decline", na=False, case=False) , "POS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\becs return|ACH DEBIT RETURN|FAIL SI CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(1000), "ECS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ RETURN|cheque returned charge|CHRG: [OI]/W RETURN|CHQ DISHON|CHQ RET CHARGES|CHQ RET CHG|CHQ RETURN CHRGS|CHQ.*RET CHGS|CHQ.*RTD CHGS|CHQ RTN CHARG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^08-$|Exceeds arrangement|Funds insufficient|Effects not cleared|Refer to draw|Drawer\\.s signature|Payment stopped by|Kindly contact Draw|CHQ RTN|CHEQU[ER] RETURN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.isin([500,90,54,300,354,590]) , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RETURN CHARGES", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bACH DEBIT RETURN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ECS DEBIT |^ACH |^ADM-|TRANSFER ADM-|DEBIT TRANS ACH", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bACH CREDIT|ACH Credit|^ACH [0-9]|^ACH ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_CREDIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("TRANSFER ATM$", na=False, case=False) , "ATM_MONEY_TRANSFER"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHEQUE DEPOSIT|\\bCHQ NO|\\bCHQS?|^BY CLG$|\\bCTS CLG|outward clg|\\b[IO]W CLG|\\bCLG DTD?|clg dated|^clg\\b|MICR CLG|BY CLG TRF|^CLEARING|^CHEQ|^[Cc]heque|BY CLEARING|PRESENT CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("^VISA-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FUEL_SURCHARGE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPOS TXN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NFS/ATM/CWD|CASH WITHDRAWAL \\(ATM\\)|ATM Withdrawal|\\bATM:+", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[0-9]{6}[X]{6}[0-9]{4} [0-9]", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_CASH_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0-9]{5,6}$", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
        [transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0-9]{5,6}$", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("Int\\.Pd|CREDIT INTERES|^INT ADJ |^BY INTT|^By Int.CR.", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "INTEREST"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("OD PENAL INTEREST|OD PNL INTT|Interest For The Period", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INTEREST_OVERDRAFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("[Cc]losure", na=False, case=False)  , "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^SWEEP TO|^SWEEP FROM", na=False, case=False)  , "AUTO_SWEEP"],
        #grepl("Debit for RD", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "RECURRING_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("MIN BAL CHGS|CHRG: MINIMUM BAL", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "NMMAB_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ETAX[0-9]|^INCOME TAX", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "DIRECT_TAX"], #has to be after charges
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bGST\\b|Central Govt Taxes|\\bVT PAYMENT|Tax Payment", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("interest reversal - COVID-19", na=False, case=False) , "EMI_MORATORIUM"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CHRGS|^CHRG:|^Charges for|\\bchrgs?|\\bCHRGS?", na=False, case=False) , "CHARGES"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['transactionCategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="TRANSFER")

'}]

+import pandas as pd
+import pytest
+
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.AuSmallFinanceBank import (
+    categorize_AuSmallFinance_transactions,
+)
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.BankOfMaharashtra import (
+    categorize_BankOfMaharashtra_transactions,
+)
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.Canara import categorize_Canara_transactions
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.HDFC import categorize_HDFC_transactions
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.Kotak import categorize_Kotak_transactions
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.PNB import categorize_PNB_transactions
+
+
+def transactions(*rows):
+    defaults = {
+        "description": "",
+        "remark": "",
+        "amount": 100,
+        "type": "CREDIT",
+        "balanceAfterTransaction": 1000,
+    }
+    return pd.DataFrame([{**defaults, **row} for row in rows])
+
+
+def test_pnb_six_digit_bare_remark_is_a_paid_cheque():
+    result = categorize_PNB_transactions(
+        transactions(
+            {"remark": "123456", "type": "DEBIT"},
+            {"remark": "12345", "type": "DEBIT"},
+            {"remark": "1234567", "type": "DEBIT"},
+        ),
+        "SAVING",
+    )
+
+    assert result.transactionCategory.tolist() == [
+        "CHEQUE_PAID",
+        "CHEQUE_PAID",
+        "TRANSFER",
+    ]
+
+
+@pytest.mark.parametrize(
+    "categorizer",
+    [
+        categorize_AuSmallFinance_transactions,
+        categorize_Canara_transactions,
+        categorize_HDFC_transactions,
+    ],
+)
+def test_micr_clearing_tag_is_not_used_as_cheque_party_name(categorizer):
+    result = categorizer(
+        transactions(
+            {
+                "description": "CHQ PAID-MICR CLG-RAVI KUMAR",
+                "type": "DEBIT",
+            },
+            {"description": "CHQ PAID-ANITA SHAH", "type": "DEBIT"},
+        ),
+        "SAVING",
+    )
+
+    assert result.partyName.iloc[0] == "Ravi Kumar"
+    assert result.partyName.iloc[1] == "Anita Shah"
+
+
+def test_plain_pnb_neft_credit_extracts_the_sender_name():
+    result = categorize_PNB_transactions(
+        transactions(
+            {"description": "NEFT RAVI KUMAR", "type": "CREDIT"},
+            {"description": "NEFT-ANITA SHAH", "type": "CREDIT"},
+        ),
+        "SAVING",
+    )
+
+    assert result.transactionCategory.tolist() == ["NEFT", "NEFT"]
+    assert result.partyName.tolist() == ["Ravi Kumar", "Anita Shah"]
+
+
+def test_inbound_kotak_upi_credit_uses_sender_after_reference():
+    result = categorize_Kotak_transactions(
+        transactions(
+            {
+                "description": "UPI_CR/123456789/RAVI KUMAR",
+                "type": "CREDIT",
+            },
+            {"description": "UPI/ANITA SHAH/123456789", "type": "DEBIT"},
+        ),
+        "SAVING",
+    )
+
+    assert result.transactionCategory.tolist() == ["UPI", "UPI"]
+    assert result.partyName.tolist() == ["Ravi Kumar", "Anita Shah"]
+
+
+def test_one_unit_bom_credit_is_account_verification_only_at_token_amount():
+    result = categorize_BankOfMaharashtra_transactions(
+        transactions(
+            {"description": "TOKEN CREDIT", "amount": 1, "type": "CREDIT"},
+            {"description": "TOKEN CREDIT", "amount": 2, "type": "CREDIT"},
+        ),
+        "SAVING",
+        "",
+    )
+
+    assert result.transactionCategory.tolist() == [
+        "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION",
+        "TRANSFER",
+    ]
*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

steps.message: The focused tests catch one important baseline nuance: HDFC already leaves the simpler `CHQ PAID-ANITA SHAH` form blank, while AU and Canara resolve it. I’m preserving that existing behavior and asserting the new extraction only for the reported `MICR CLG` layout.

import pandas as pd
import pytest

from categorizationapp.BankScripts.AuSmallFinanceBank import (
    categorize_AuSmallFinance_transactions,
)
from categorizationapp.BankScripts.BankOfMaharashtra import (
    categorize_BankOfMaharashtra_transactions,
)
from categorizationapp.BankScripts.Canara import categorize_Canara_transactions
from categorizationapp.BankScripts.HDFC import categorize_HDFC_transactions
from categorizationapp.BankScripts.Kotak import categorize_Kotak_transactions
from categorizationapp.BankScripts.PNB import categorize_PNB_transactions


def transactions(*rows):
    defaults = {
        "description": "",
        "remark": "",
        "amount": 100,
        "type": "CREDIT",
        "balanceAfterTransaction": 1000,
    }
    return pd.DataFrame([{**defaults, **row} for row in rows])


def test_pnb_six_digit_bare_remark_is_a_paid_cheque():
    result = categorize_PNB_transactions(
        transactions(
            {"remark": "123456", "type": "DEBIT"},
            {"remark": "12345", "type": "DEBIT"},
            {"remark": "1234567", "type": "DEBIT"},
        ),
        "SAVING",
    )

    assert result.transactionCategory.tolist() == [
        "CHEQUE_PAID",
        "CHEQUE_PAID",
        "TRANSFER",
    ]


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    ("categorizer", "ordinary_party_name"),
    [
        (categorize_AuSmallFinance_transactions, "Anita Shah"),
        (categorize_Canara_transactions, "Anita Shah"),
        (categorize_HDFC_transactions, ""),
    ],
)
def test_micr_clearing_tag_is_not_used_as_cheque_party_name(
    categorizer, ordinary_party_name
):
    result = categorizer(
        transactions(
            {
                "description": "CHQ PAID-MICR CLG-RAVI KUMAR",
                "type": "DEBIT",
            },
            {"description": "CHQ PAID-ANITA SHAH", "type": "DEBIT"},
        ),
        "SAVING",
    )

    assert result.partyName.iloc[0] == "Ravi Kumar"
    assert result.partyName.iloc[1] == ordinary_party_name


def test_plain_pnb_neft_credit_extracts_the_sender_name():
    result = categorize_PNB_transactions(
        transactions(
            {"description": "NEFT RAVI KUMAR", "type": "CREDIT"},
            {"description": "NEFT-ANITA SHAH", "type": "CREDIT"},
        ),
        "SAVING",
    )

    assert result.transactionCategory.tolist() == ["NEFT", "NEFT"]
    assert result.partyName.tolist() == ["Ravi Kumar", "Anita Shah"]


def test_inbound_kotak_upi_credit_uses_sender_after_reference():
    result = categorize_Kotak_transactions(
        transactions(
            {
                "description": "UPI_CR/123456789/RAVI KUMAR",
                "type": "CREDIT",
            },
            {"description": "UPI/ANITA SHAH/123456789", "type": "DEBIT"},
        ),
        "SAVING",
    )

    assert result.transactionCategory.tolist() == ["UPI", "UPI"]
    assert result.partyName.tolist() == ["Ravi Kumar", "Anita Shah"]


def test_one_unit_bom_credit_is_account_verification_only_at_token_amount():
    result = categorize_BankOfMaharashtra_transactions(
        transactions(
            {"description": "TOKEN CREDIT", "amount": 1, "type": "CREDIT"},
            {"description": "TOKEN CREDIT", "amount": 2, "type": "CREDIT"},
        ),
        "SAVING",
        "",
    )

    assert result.transactionCategory.tolist() == [
        "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION",
        "TRANSFER",
    ]
